# JPBC Web Designs

> Web design studio in Petaling Jaya, Malaysia. We hand-code fast, custom websites
> for local small businesses on an affordable monthly subscription: RM0 down and
> RM179/month, including a .com/.com.my domain, hosting, SSL, unlimited edits,
> and WhatsApp support. Lump-sum option from RM3,500 + RM49/month hosting & care.

Key facts:
- Flagship offer: RM0 down, RM179/month for a custom, hand-coded 5-page website
  (12-month minimum, then month-to-month). Domain, hosting, SSL, and unlimited
  content edits included.
- Lump sum option: from RM3,500 one-time + RM49/month hosting & care.
- Add-ons: extra pages (RM100/page), Google Business Profile optimisation
  (RM500), local SEO pages (RM300/month), e-commerce/booking (custom quote).
- No WordPress or page builders: hand-coded static sites that load in under
  1 second, with no plugins to update and nothing to hack.
- Sites built in Bahasa Melayu, English, Chinese, or any combination.
- Typical delivery: live within 7 days of design approval.
- Primary contact: WhatsApp click-to-chat.

Locations served (Klang Valley, Malaysia):
- Petaling Jaya: https://jpbcwebdesigns.com/locations/petaling-jaya
- Kuala Lumpur: https://jpbcwebdesigns.com/locations/kuala-lumpur
- Subang Jaya: https://jpbcwebdesigns.com/locations/subang-jaya
- Shah Alam: https://jpbcwebdesigns.com/locations/shah-alam
- Puchong: https://jpbcwebdesigns.com/locations/puchong
- Klang: https://jpbcwebdesigns.com/locations/klang

## Canonical pages

- [Home](https://jpbcwebdesigns.com/): overview of the offer and how it works
- [Pricing](https://jpbcwebdesigns.com/pricing): full package details, comparison table, add-ons, payment FAQ
- [Web Design](https://jpbcwebdesigns.com/services/web-design): the core service
- [Local SEO](https://jpbcwebdesigns.com/services/seo): ranking in "near me" searches
- [Google Business Profile](https://jpbcwebdesigns.com/services/google-business-profile): Maps listing optimisation
- [Our Work](https://jpbcwebdesigns.com/work): portfolio with load-time stats
- [About](https://jpbcwebdesigns.com/about): founder-led small studio story
- [FAQ](https://jpbcwebdesigns.com/faq): pricing, ownership, domains, timelines, edit policy, languages
- [Get Started](https://jpbcwebdesigns.com/get-started): 60-second intake form
- [Contact](https://jpbcwebdesigns.com/contact): WhatsApp-first contact options
